description_long: This house features a boxy, modernist design with clean, straight lines and a flat base platform. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper floor set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile. The roof is a distinctive shed style, sloping in one direction, and the exterior is punctuated by rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and multiple window openings, while the rear has a large, open terrace or patio area. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or a similar solid material, with minimal decorative elements. The overall aesthetic is utilitarian and contemporary, suitable for urban residential environments.
description: A modern, two-story house with a stepped shed roof, rectangular windows, and a recessed entryway, built on a flat platform. The design is minimalist and functional, with a prominent open terrace at the rear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped shed roof and the solid, windowless side wall with a recessed terrace area at the rear.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and the two-story facade with upper-level windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the shed roof slope and the open terrace at the back.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the large open terrace or patio area, with upper-level windows and a solid lower wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, no porch or decorative columns, and a minimalist door design.
